text: I keep going back and forth on whether to use TypeScript or stay with plain JS. What would you do?

Hey Atlas, what do you remember about me so far?

I have three dogs josie ruckus and sprout and also two cats.

Woke up a little slow today. Feeling ok, a little depressed. FOund out oracle just laid off 30000 software engineers :/.  have non stop meetings this morning. Trimble T&L Brand Meeting and had the AI Safety training simultaneously. I'm recording them both and juping back and forth. I cancled the Rebranding touchpoint so dont have to stress abot that but need to at least complete mockups for tpw frame and push the rest of my branches.  Just checking in. How are you doing today?
